calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-09-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation.
Declaration of Plaintiff's Witness: Ernest Knowles in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Cuauhtemoc Sicairos ind and dba Alonzo Trucking as follows:
Principal $25,537.61
Interest $1,624.00
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $332.50, for a total of $29,986.11
Plaintiff is entitled and the owner to the leased equipment listed in the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2005 Continued To Sep-12-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
